summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five open PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, or security-route actions are recommended from the hydrated artifact.

actions.reason: Unique open feature/bug-fix PR with proof and maintainer ownership signals; not closable or mergeable in this inventory plan.
Low-signal indicators and failing proof make it unsuitable for merge or fixed-by closeout, but low-signal PR closeout is disabled for this job; keep as independent maintainer-review backlog.
Open draft maintainer PR with a focused implementation path; keep independently for maintainer completion/review.
Open draft maintainer PR with distinct affected files and scope; keep independently for maintainer review.
Open draft maintainer PR with a distinct implementation surface; keep independently for maintainer completion/review.
